pr.title: [docs] Add troubleshooting entry for false usage/context limits after version upgrade (#61703)
pr.body:
## Summary

Adds a troubleshooting entry documenting that sessions created before a version upgrade may show false-positive usage limits, context limits, or safety guardrail blocks due to session-format mismatch between versions.

References #61703

## Root cause

The v2.1.149 \/usage\ per-category breakdown rewrite (CHANGELOG.md:9) changed how usage limits are calculated. Sessions started on an earlier version have a different internal usage state layout, causing the new breakdown logic to misread the data and report false-positive limit hits across all three categories (usage, context, safety).

## Workaround

Start a new session instead of resuming the pre-upgrade one.
pr.author: giruuuuj
